title: exostema lancifolium var. lucidum
intro: Exostema lancifolium var. lucidum, also known as the 'wild coffee' or 'wild coffee tree', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Exostema lancifolium var. lucidum include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The health benefits of consuming this plant are attributed to its high caffeine content, which can increase alertness, boost energy, and improve cognitive function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions by drying the leaves and stems, which can be used to create a stimulating and medicinal brew.
